books.title: AMBA
books.author: Andrew Hallman
books.blurb:
AMBA

Book Blurb

THE DEADLIEST PREDATOR ALIVE HAS TWO LEGS IN THIS STRIPPED-DOWN STRUGGLE FOR SURVIVAL—A THRILLER WITH HEART.

Primorsky Krai—a remote wilderness in the Russian Far East encompassed by endless hills, vast forests, and long winters that bury the land in snow and silence. This is the last place in the world where Siberian tigers—otherwise known as AMBA to the indigenous Udege people—prowl in the wild.

Ex Elite Russian Special Forces Sniper Yuri Kaskilev has found home in the twelve-man Anti-Poaching Brigade in Primorsky Krai. Protecting the area’s great cats has given him a sense of purpose he’s never known before.

But when Yuri rescues two tiger cubs from their dying mother, he unleashes an unforeseen chain of events. As he and his partner rush the wriggling cubs to scientists at a nearby nature reserve, they come across three poachers heading to inspect their traps, and Yuri is startled to recognize one of them as a former comrade.

Suddenly, the violent world Yuri thought he left behind is closer than ever…

Until he meets Dr. Miko Katanabe, one of the world’s leading tiger experts. As she attempts the unthinkable—training the motherless cubs and introducing them into the wild upon maturity—it becomes apparent that she may have found a way to bolster the jungle cats’ dwindling population. So, when one of the cubs escapes into the surrounding wild, Yuri and Miko chase after it in a desperate pursuit.

Along the way, these two proud and fiercely independent individuals must learn to work together to track the frightened cub while also surviving a night in sub-zero elements and fending off vicious attacks by a rogue tiger following their trail.

Will Yuri discover the middle ground between peace and violence in order to save all AMBA and the woman he has come to love? Can Miko learn to trust Yuri and accept his violent past?

Shortened:

THE DEADLIEST PREDATOR ALIVE HAS TWO LEGS IN THIS STRIPPED-DOWN STRUGGLE FOR SURVIVAL—A THRILLER WITH HEART.

Primorsky Krai, a remote wilderness in the Russian Far East encompassed by vast forests and long winters, is the last place in the world where Siberian tigers—otherwise known as AMBA to the indigenous Udege people—prowl in the wild.

Ex Elite Russian Special Forces Sniper Yuri Kaskilev has found home in the twelve-man Anti-Poaching Brigade in Primorsky Krai. Protecting the area’s great cats has given him a sense of purpose he’s never known before. But when Yuri rescues two tiger cubs from their dying mother and he and his partner rush the wriggling cubs to scientists at a nearby nature reserve, they come across three poachers heading to inspect their traps, and Yuri is startled to recognize one of them as a former comrade.

Suddenly, the violent world Yuri thought he left behind is closer than ever…

Until he meets Dr. Miko Katanabe, one of the world’s leading tiger experts. As she attempts the unthinkable—training the motherless cubs and introducing them into the wild upon maturity—it becomes apparent that she may have found a way to bolster the jungle cats’ dwindling population. So, when one of the cubs escapes into the surrounding wild, Yuri and Miko chase after it in a desperate pursuit. Along the way, these two proud and fiercely independent individuals must learn to work together to track the frightened cub while also surviving a night in sub-zero elements and fending off vicious attacks by a rogue tiger following their trail.

Will Yuri discover the middle ground between peace and violence in order to save all AMBA and the woman he has come to love? Can Miko learn to trust Yuri and accept his violent past?

books.title: By Force or Fear
books.author: Thonie Hevron
books.blurb:
By Force or Fear (Meredith Ryan Mystery, #1)

Book Blurb

The shocking end to a hostage situation brings Meredith Ryan, a courageous Sheriff’s Deputy, to the attention of a powerful young judge.

As the magistrate’s obsession grows, he continues exercising his considerable influence, and Meredith is stuck juggling the inner workings of her career—all the while tracking down a violent killer in the Sonoma wine country.

After losing almost everyone close to her, Meredith realizes that she must take a stand. Even if it costs her. But as Meredith is finally closing in on the Sonoma murderer, she gets snared in a trap that she may not walk out of alive.

By Force or Fear is a police procedural thriller about a brave, young deputy who identifies and faces her enemies—both within herself and the real world.

Amazon intro add-on:

EXPERIENCE THE PULSE-POUNDING TENSION OF A HIGH-STAKES CAT-AND-MOUSE CHASE IN THIS ENTHRALLING POLICE PROCEDURAL THRILLER THAT KEEPS YOU GUESSING UNTIL THE VERY LAST PAGE.

Amazon outro add-on:

Unlock its gripping pages today and experience book one in a thrilling series readers can't put down!

Cover tagline:

Forged in danger, one deputy’s bravery goes beyond the badge

books.title: Dark Justice
books.author: J.L. Hughes
books.blurb:
Dark JusticeBroken Jade 1

Book Blurb

COVER COPY / WEBSITE / INGRAM LISTING

A killer's vengeance revives buried secrets…proving some family ties are meant to be severed—by death.

Haunted by the unsolved murder of her mother two decades ago, NYPD homicide detective Jade Carmichael is thrust into a chilling hunt for a serial killer known as “The Redeemer.” His gruesome methods and cryptic messages tie directly to the case that shattered her childhood in Shadow Hook, an eerie town in Upstate New York where secrets fester and justice falters.

As The Redeemer targets high-profile victims with no apparent connection, he taunts Jade with clues about her mother’s killer—secrets that could unravel her team, the department, and the very town she’s sworn to protect. With time running out, Jade must confront ghosts from her past while navigating the dangerous alliances within her team: her loyal but enigmatic partner Kane, steadfast friend Jackson, a rising rookie detective, Amy, and the unsettling department shrink, Dr. Abraham Maxwell, whose knowledge may prove as deadly as it is valuable.

But The Redeemer is no ordinary predator. He’s a calculating artist of vengeance, delivering retribution in a way that blurs the line between justice and monstrosity. In a high-stakes game of cat and mouse, Jade will come face-to-face with truths she’s not ready to confront and a blood connection more horrifying than she could imagine.

Dark Justice, the first installment in the Broken Jade series, delivers an electrifying mix of psychological intrigue, police procedural grit, and shocking twists. Perfect for fans of James Patterson’s Alex Cross, and A Killer In The Family, this thriller will grip you from the first page and haunt you long after the final twist.

AMAZON BLURB

This story will keep you on edge, up late, and haunt you long after the final dark twist.” –D.P .Lyle, award-winning author of the Jake Longly and Cain/Harper thriller series and co-creator of the Outliers Writing University

books.title: The Doormen: The Complete Series
books.author: Jarret Mazza
books.blurb:
The Doormen: The Complete Series

Book blurb

WEBSITE

Welcome to the city that never sleeps—and where the night has its own code.

When former Marine Jon Haze returns home from war, he’s not looking for trouble—he’s looking for purpose. But purpose finds him behind the velvet ropes of The Conquistador, Manhattan’s most exclusive nightclub, where the line between order and chaos is guarded by the men who rule the doors: The Doormen.

From the dark pulse of Queens to the glittering underworld of Manhattan’s nightlife, Jon’s journey is one of loyalty, redemption, and survival. As he rises through the ranks, he uncovers a web of corruption, betrayal, and power that stretches far beyond the club’s walls. When old enemies return and new threats emerge, Jon must decide what kind of soldier he really is—one who follows orders, or one who writes his own.

This gritty, adrenaline-fueled trilogy—Dawn of the Trade, Revenge of the Fallen Sons, and OverTaker Territory—delivers nonstop action, moral complexity, and the raw pulse of New York after dark.

Three books. One man’s war for redemption.

AMAZON

But purpose finds him behind the velvet ropes of The Conquistador, Manhattan’s most exclusive nightclub, where the line between order and chaos is guarded by the men who rule the doors: The Doormen.

From the dark pulse of Queens to the glittering underworld of Manhattan’s nightlife, Jon’s journey is one of loyalty, redemption, and survival. As he rises through the ranks, he uncovers a web of corruption, betrayal, and power that stretches far beyond the club’s walls. When old enemies return and new threats emerge, Jon must decide what kind of soldier he really is—one who follows orders, or one who writes his own.

This gritty, adrenaline-fueled trilogy—Dawn of the Trade, Revenge of the Fallen Sons, and OverTaker Territory—delivers nonstop action, moral complexity, and the raw pulse of New York after dark.

Three books. One man’s war for redemption.

Dive into The Doorman Trilogy today—and step behind the ropes into a world where honor isn’t earned with medals, but with blood. Order your copy now.

TAGLINE

The war may be over, but the battlefield just moved to Manhattan.

books.title: Callihan: Valley of Skulls
books.author: L.J. Martin
books.blurb:
Callihan: Valley of Skulls (Callihan 1)

Book Blurb

COVER COPY / WEBSITE / INGRAM LISTING

From the author of the Two Thousand Grueling Miles series comes Callihan, A YA Western Adventure of Revenge and Redemption.

Conn Donahey was ready to carve out a life worth fighting for. But in a single night, it all went up in flames. His new wife—gone. His hard-earned fortune—stolen. Everything he loved—turned to dust. Now, only one thing drives him forward: hunting down the nine ruthless men who shattered his life.

But this mission isn't for the faint of heart. Every mile Conn rides, every outlaw he faces, pushes him closer to a deadly edge, testing whether he’s tough enough to see it through. As he rides deeper into the harsh valley known as the “Valley of Skulls,” Conn has to decide—how much of himself is he willing to sacrifice for justice?

Will Conn stop at nothing to avenge his loved ones? Or will the valley claim another lost soul?

AMAZON BLURB

But this mission isn't for the faint of heart. Every mile Conn rides, every outlaw he faces, pushes him closer to a deadly edge, testing whether he’s tough enough to see it through. As he rides deeper into the harsh valley known as the “Valley of Skulls,” Conn has to decide—how much of himself is he willing to sacrifice for justice?

Will Conn stop at nothing to avenge his loved ones? Or will the valley claim another lost soul?

Perfect for fans of action-packed young adult westerns, Callihan: Valley of Skulls promises grit, vengeance, and the relentless spirit of survival. Join Conn on his journey—order your copy today and ride into the heart of revenge!

Will Conn stop at nothing to avenge his loved ones…or will the valley claim another lost soul?

PRAISE

n/a

Original blurb from Larry:Just when Conn Donahey thought he had the world by the tail and nothing could go wrong…everything did. His new wife was taken from him, the proceeds of years of work stolen, everything he held dear turned to dust. Only one thing kept him from ending it all…the nine lowlifes responsible. Maybe he’d rest in peace when they all roasted in Hell. But that would prove to be a hell of a row of stumps to remove. Was he man enough? Could he live through the task?

books.title: Rowdy: The Complete Series
books.author: Chris Mullen
books.blurb:
﻿Rowdy: The Complete Series
Book Blurb




From award-winning author Chris Mullen comes an explosively exciting coming-of-age western series. Immerse yourself in this thrilling saga, filled with danger, redemption, and unbreakable bonds.


Rowdy: Wild and Mean, Sharp and Keen sets the stage for a riveting journey. Follow thirteen-year-old Rowdy, who, after a tragic encounter with a merciless gang, finds himself adrift on the Mississippi River. Alone and determined, he embarks on a perilous quest, honing his skills and becoming the man his father envisioned. 


In the bonus short story, The Hunt, ride with Rowdy into the mountains as he and Roberson embark on a long-awaited hunting expedition.  Trekking deep in the rugged landscape, they soon find themselves stalked by an invisible terror lurking in the shadows. Faced with mounting dangers, they must make a harrowing choice in this riveting tale of suspense and survival.


In Rowdy: Redemption, a devastating fire sparks Rowdy's relentless pursuit of vengeance. Join him as he unravels the mystery behind the Circle 'R' arson, seeking retribution for his fallen comrades. 


The heart-pounding adventure continues in Rowdy: Dead or Alive. Fleeing false accusations, Rowdy races against time to elude capture and clear his name. Battling through adversity, he discovers unexpected allies and reunites with a familiar face from his past. However, his path is fraught with peril as old enemies resurface and a relentless bounty hunter tracks his every move. 


In Rowdy: Rescue, an enemy's ruthless act plunges Rowdy into a race against time. When his beloved friends Thomas and Anne Marie are kidnapped, he sets out on a dangerous pursuit through treacherous terrain. 


Witness the internal struggle between justice and revenge in Rowdy: To Catch a Killer. Rowdy finds himself torn when he joins a pursuit to capture cattle rustlers. However, when vengeance strikes close to home, he must confront his conflicting emotions and decide the rightful course of action. 


The thrilling finale, Rowdy: Return, brings together all the lessons Rowdy has learned on his arduous journey. Faced with a treacherous storm and a cunning gambler, Rowdy's pursuit takes an unexpected turn. Driven by love and family bonds, Rowdy risks everything to find and save his brother. 


Join Rowdy as he navigates a world of peril and discovery, where survival, redemption, and love collide. Grab your copy today and immerse yourself in the gripping world of Rowdy!

books.title: The Shrinking Island
books.author: Mickey Spillane
books.blurb:
The Shrinking Island

Book Blurb

An exciting trio of classic boy’s adventures from a recognized Grand Master in the mystery genre—Mickey Spillane.

In The Day the Sea Rolled Back, an inexplicable freak of nature rolls the sea back from the shores of the Caribbean Island of Peolle and allows Larry and Josh to search for the wreck of the Nantucket Belle and its supposed hoard of Spanish treasure. But—unbeknownst to them—the boys are closely tracked by a pair of local fishermen who mean to take the treasure for themselves.

During The Ship That Never Was, Larry and Josh task themselves with rescuing an ancient sailor adrift in a mysterious longboat and find themselves involved in finding a lost island and restoring a missing heir to the throne of a kingdom.

In The Shrinking Island, Larry and Josh embark on their most exciting adventure yet when they find themselves up against dangerous storms, a missing Spanish galleon, a gang of greedy salvage hunters, and a disappearing Island in a race against time to save the sacred land of their friend’s ancestors…

Mickey Spillane is considered one of the greatest writers of the 20th Century for not only creating Mike Hammer—the toughest private eye of all time—but for many other hardboiled novels that turned a generation of well-mannered mysteries on their head. In this collection, the adventures of Larry and Josh will thrill those seeking adventure…

books.title: Gateways to Annihilation: Stories
books.author: Jarret Keene
books.blurb:
Gateways to Annihilation: StoriesBook Blurb

COVER COPY / WEBSITE / INGRAM LISTING

A cursed pizzeria. A haunted B-movie legacy. A tycoon’s final robotic companion.

Welcome to Gateways to Annihilation—a searing collection of horror short stories that seamlessly fuses right-here-and-right-now themes of war trauma, pandemic stress, religious terrorism, political extremism, cryptozoological mania, and the human hunger for a sudden cleansing apocalypse, while encouraging readers to reach for a bag of movie popcorn in the darkness of the night.

Author Jarret Keene conjures 14 twisted tales where monsters lurk in neon shadows and infernal items hold lives hostage. Whether it’s a Japanese war vet trapped inside Hollywood rubber suits, a Vegas comic shop owner stalked by satanic forces, or a billionaire’s android nurse with sinister protocols, each story spirals into the uncanny with razor precision. In this collection that melds the nostalgic eeriness of The Twilight Zone with the nihilistic bite of Black Mirror, victims and perpetrators dance in blood-spattered loops of fate. Perfect for fans of weird fiction and supernatural thrillers, Gateways to Annihilation is literary horror with a cult heart.

Will these characters escape the horrors they summon—or are they already lost to the darkness within?

AMAZON BLURB

“Keene’s collection is quietly magnificent. I can think of few things better than spending your time reading his words.” –Mercedes M. Yardley, two-time Bram Stoker Award-Winner

A cursed pizzeria. A haunted B-movie legacy. A tycoon’s final robotic companion.

Welcome to Gateways to Annihilation—a searing collection of horror short stories that seamlessly fuses right-here-and-right-now themes of war trauma, pandemic stress, religious terrorism, political extremism, cryptozoological mania, and the human hunger for a sudden cleansing apocalypse, while encouraging readers to reach for a bag of movie popcorn in the darkness of the night.

Author Jarret Keene conjures 14 twisted tales where monsters lurk in neon shadows and infernal items hold lives hostage. Whether it’s a Japanese war vet trapped inside Hollywood rubber suits, a Vegas comic shop owner stalked by satanic forces, or a billionaire’s android nurse with sinister protocols, each story spirals into the uncanny with razor precision. In this collection that melds the nostalgic eeriness of The Twilight Zone with the nihilistic bite of Black Mirror, victims and perpetrators dance in blood-spattered loops of fate. Perfect for fans of weird fiction and supernatural thrillers, Gateways to Annihilation is literary horror with a cult heart.

Will these characters escape the horrors they summon—or are they already lost to the darkness within? Order your copy now to find out.

COVER TAGLINE

“Quietly magnificent.” –Mercedes M. Yardley, two-time Bram Stoker Award-Winner

Original from author

A short story collection that blurs the boundary between postmodern fantasy and genre revivalism, Jarret Keene’s Gateway to Annihilation filters iconic horror, dark fantasy, and crime-noir through the prism of the author’s vivid imagination. From a Japanese war vet turned suit actor trapped in Hollywood B-movies (“Son of Mogar”) to Howard Hughes’ aides assembling a robot to care for the crumbling tycoon and to make their chores easier (“Swanson”) to a 1990s Las Vegas pizzeria owner-cum-comics collector on the run from satanic forces (“Comic-Book Hell”), the characters in these head-spinning, heart-pounding tales are at once victims and perpetrators in extreme scenarios in which the advent of the uncanny and otherworldly hinges on nothing more than mere spell cast, a knife toss, an atomic button-push.

Published in outlets as diverse as New England Review and Neon Druid: An Anthology of Urban Celtic Fantasy, the 14 stories (70,000 words total) gathered in Gateway to Annihilation bring to mind the sinister-gaslight appeal of Ambrose Bierce and Shirley Jackson, tinged with the haunted-neon impulse of contemporary Las Vegas. Inspired by old and new anthology series (Outer Limits and Twilight Zone meet Black Mirror and Guillermo Del Toro’s Cabinet Curiosities), Keene’s Gateway to Annihilation seamlessly fuses right-here-and-right-now themes of war trauma, pandemic stress, religious terrorism, political extremism, cryptozoological mania, and the human hunger for a sudden cleansing apocalypse, while encouraging readers to reach for a bag of movie popcorn in the darkness of the night.

books.title: All The Way Under
books.author: Rachel Robinson
books.blurb:
﻿Tab 1
All The Way Under
Book Blurb


COVER COPY / WEBSITE / INGRAM LISTING
She chased freedom, but danger and desire caught her first.
Saylor Wyndham has everything money can buy—except the freedom to chase her dream of sailing solo around the globe. When her family and boyfriend call her ambitions reckless, she leaves them behind and sets sail alone, only to be captured by ruthless pirates off the coast of South Africa.
Navy SEAL Brody McCoy’s mission is clear: infiltrate the pirate camp, rescue the hostage, and bring down the terrorists without blowing his cover. To succeed, he has to pose as a captive himself, getting close to Saylor in ways that test his patience and his self-control.
Saylor thinks Brody is just another man trying to cage her spirit, while Brody sees her as a spoiled heiress with no clue what real danger is. But as their risky escape plan unfolds, tension turns to heat, and one wrong move could cost them everything.


AMAZON BLURB 


She chased freedom, but danger and desire caught her first.
Saylor Wyndham has everything money can buy—except the freedom to chase her dream of sailing solo around the globe. When her family and boyfriend call her ambitions reckless, she leaves them behind and sets sail alone, only to be captured by ruthless pirates off the coast of South Africa.
Navy SEAL Brody McCoy’s mission is clear: infiltrate the pirate camp, rescue the hostage, and bring down the terrorists without blowing his cover. To succeed, he has to pose as a captive himself, getting close to Saylor in ways that test his patience and his self-control.
Saylor thinks Brody is just another man trying to cage her spirit, while Brody sees her as a spoiled heiress with no clue what real danger is. But as their risky escape plan unfolds, tension turns to heat, and one wrong move could cost them everything.
If you love forced proximity, enemies to lovers, military romance, and high-stakes adventure with a swoon-worthy protector and a guaranteed happily ever after, All The Way Under will leave you secretly wishing you could be trapped by pirates, too. Buy your copy now!


COVER TAGLINE


Sometimes the deepest love is forged in darkness.
books.drive_file_name: Book Blurb -- All The Way Under

books.title: Arabelle's Beast
books.author: Courtney Deran
books.blurb:
﻿Tab 1
Arabelle's Beast
Book Blurb


COVER COPY / WEBSITE / INGRAM LISTING


Merciless, ruthless, and cruel, but nothing describes him better than Beast.
Arabelle Williamson was born to dance, not to barter her future. But when her father's business fails and a ruthless businessman demands repayment, Arabelle agrees to the unthinkable: she’ll belong to Florian Larsson—on paper, in public, and in his house.
He says she’ll be his fiancée.
He means she’ll be his possession.
Florian is cold, calculating, and dangerously obsessed. Yet the more Arabelle pushes back, the deeper he pulls her in. What began as a transaction becomes something far more twisted—and far more real. Obsession becomes love, but revenge takes precedence over all else.
She’s his Beauty, and he’s her Beast.
But can they have a happily ever after?




AMAZON BLURB 


Merciless, ruthless, and cruel, but nothing describes him better than Beast.
Arabelle Williamson was born to dance, not to barter her future. But when her father's business fails, and a ruthless businessman demands repayment, Arabelle agrees to the unthinkable: she’ll belong to Florian Larsson—on paper, in public, and in his house.
He says she’ll be his fiancée.
He means she’ll be his possession.
Florian is cold, calculating, and dangerously obsessed. Yet the more Arabelle pushes back, the deeper he pulls her in. What began as a transaction becomes something far more twisted—and far more real. Obsession becomes love, but revenge takes precedence over all else.
She’s his Beauty, and he’s her Beast.
But can they have a happily ever after?
Arabelle’s Beast is a dark, addictive dark romance with a fairy-tale twist. If you love marriage-of-convenience stakes, enemies-to-lovers tension, forced proximity, and obsession that turns into something far more dangerous, this one’s for you.


COVER TAGLINE


Beauty was never meant to tame the beast—only to break him.

books.title: Deal Breakers
books.author: Laura Lee
books.blurb:
Deal Breakers

(Dealing with Love 1)

Book Blurb

COVER COPY / WEBSITE / INGRAM LISTING

What happens when one steamy night turns into the surprise of a lifetime?

Riley McIntyre thought it’d be simple—a one-time thing, then he and Devyn Summers would go back to being best friends. He couldn’t have been more wrong. Years have gone by, and every day without her has been a constant reminder of how badly he messed up. Now he’s back, ready to prove he’s changed and to fight for the only girl he’s ever loved. But Devyn’s been sitting on a secret that could change everything.

Riley stormed back into Devyn’s life just when she thought she’d finally moved on. He was her best friend, her everything—until he left without a word. She’s tried to forget him and build a life that didn’t include the boy who broke her heart. Now, he’s back, saying he’s ready to be the man she always believed he could be. But trusting him again might be the biggest risk she’s ever taken. Can she open her heart to him once more, or is this one deal that’s just too broken?

AMAZON BLURB

But Devyn’s been sitting on a secret that could change everything.

Riley stormed back into Devyn’s life just when she thought she’d finally moved on. He was her best friend, her everything—until he left without a word. She’s tried to forget him and build a life that didn’t include the boy who broke her heart. Now, he’s back, saying he’s ready to be the man she always believed he could be. But trusting him again might be the biggest risk she’s ever taken. Can she open her heart to him once more, or is this one deal that’s just too broken?

Deal Breakers is a hot and hilarious best-friends-to-lovers romantic comedy, filled with second-chance romance, a surprise twist, and laugh-out-loud moments. Each installment in the Dealing with Love series can be read as a standalone.

COVER TAGLINE

Love is complicated, especially when it’s your best friend.

books.title: Demon Hunter: The Complete Series
books.author: Kerry Adcock
books.blurb:
Demon Hunter: The Complete Series

Book Blurb

PAPERBACK / INGRAM / WEBSITE

N/A e-book only

books.title: Matt Bannister: Books 1-9
books.author: Ken Pratt
books.blurb:
A BREWING STORM RUNS DEEPER THAN PRIDE OR HONOR IN THIS CHRISTIAN WESTERN MYSTERY COLLECTION.Fifteen years ago, the young Matt Bannister ran away from the town of Willow Falls. Now a famed US Deputy Marshal, he’s coming home to reconcile with family.

But all too quickly, he realizes that old feuds unsettled never die—and he must confront his painful past. Good thing Matt is a fighter, a killer, and a tough man who isn’t afraid to stand his ground against anyone.

As the tempest of the past collides with the present, Matt encounters religious persecution, murder, kidnapping, and lies—and his unyielding spirit becomes the beacon of redemption in a world haunted by shadows.Join Matt Bannister on a relentless quest for redemption as he faces a storm of secrets and danger in this gripping nine-book Christian Western mystery collection today!Matt Bannister: Books 1-9 includes Willow Falls, Sweethome, Bella's Dance Hall, The Wolves of Windsor Ridge, The Eckman Exception, Prairieville, Return to Willow Falls, Ballenger, and Blood Vengeance.
